mechanism: A 2-period RSI below 10 marks a short-horizon oversold extreme; going long at that close and staying flat otherwise is claimed to harvest short-horizon mean reversion. On this panel the claim is false by construction (the panel is seeded iid-style noise with a common drift), so the example demonstrates what an honest KILL looks like. The single config (period=2, entry<10, long/flat) was frozen before any returns were generated.

frozenConfig.name: EXAMPLE (kills by design): RSI(2) long/flat overlay on a synthetic noise panel
frozenConfig.mechanism: A 2-period RSI below 10 marks a short-horizon oversold extreme; going long at that close and staying flat otherwise is claimed to harvest short-horizon mean reversion. On this panel the claim is false by construction (the panel is seeded iid-style noise with a common drift), so the example demonstrates what an honest KILL looks like.
